errors.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Enter your credentials to access your account.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sent: If an account with that email exists, a reset link has been sent. Check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.description: Choose a strong password for your account.
resetPassword.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.

verifyEmail.title: Email verification
verifyEmail.success: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.error: This verification link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one from your account settings.

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
mfa.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Fill in your details to get started.

verify.title: Check your email
verify.description: We sent a verification link to your email address.
verify.body: Click the link in your email to verify your account. If you don't see it, check your spam folder.

callback.missingCode: Missing authorization code or verifier. Please sign in again.
callback.invalidState: Invalid state. Possible CSRF — please sign in again.
callback.tokenError: Token exchange failed. Please sign in again.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information.
profile.personalInfoDesc: Update your name and display name.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.subtitle: Devices currently signed in to your account.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Long-lived tokens for programmatic API access.
apiKeys.confirmRevoke: Revoke this API key? This cannot be undone.

dialog.title: Create API key
dialog.description: Give your key a name and select the permissions it needs.
dialog.name: Key name
dialog.copyWarning: Copy this key now — you won't be able to see it again.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Manage your authentication methods and security settings.

totp.title: Authenticator app (TOTP)
totp.description: Use a time-based one-time password (TOTP) app for extra login security.
totp.confirmRemove: Remove TOTP authentication? Your account will be less secure.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Biometric or hardware-key login — no password required.

setup.title: Set up authenticator app
setup.subtitle: Scan the QR code with an authenticator app, then verify with a code.
setup.alreadyDesc: An authenticator app is already set up for your account. Remove it from the security page to set up a new one.
setup.step1Desc: Open your authenticator app and scan the code below.
setup.step2Desc: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to confirm setup.

backup.title: TOTP activated
backup.description: Save these backup codes somewhere safe. Each can only be used once.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.subtitle: Passwordless login using biometrics or hardware security keys.

oauthClients.title: OAuth Clients
oauthClients.subtitle: Applications authorized to act on your behalf.
oauthClients.description: OAuth client registration and management will be available in a future release. Contact the administrator to register a new application.
oauthClients.body: If you need to integrate an application with CTech Account's identity provider, reach out via the contact page to get a client ID and secret provisioned.

toast.totpActivated: TOTP activated. Save your backup codes.
